exploration_notes: Implemented three changes to prevent IDN phishing attacks: (1) Added getHostnameWithRegex to url.ts that extracts the second-level domain from a URL using regex text pattern analysis (e.g., www.abc.com → abc). (2) Modified useLinkHandler to apply punycodeUrl conversion to ALL external links before processing (not just in the confirmation modal path), with a try/catch that shows an error notification when URL extraction fails. (3) Added tests for getHostnameWithRegex covering URLs with/without pr
